subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath made His Most Glorious Name a light and a mercy, an honor and a treasure for the people of guidance, and a fire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی جعل اسمه الابهی نورا و رحمه و شرفا و ذخرا لاصحاب الهدی و نارا
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @chastisement and requital, @law of Huququ'llah, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
